MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (206)

Appearances:
Linda Brigsby, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Arnold Evje, Esq. representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Larry Woods is present.
Joseph Koomas, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

Per counsel Evje, this case has settled. The trial date is off calendar.
